sql.if: AND (u.nickname LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.sql: FROM pt_private_appointment a LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = a.member_id LEFT JOIN pt_coach c ON c.id = a.coach_id LEFT JOIN pt_product p ON p.id = a.product_id LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = a.store_id LEFT JOIN pt_member_private_benefit b ON b.id = a.benefit_id

a.id, a.appointment_no AS appointmentNo, a.order_id AS orderId, a.benefit_id AS benefitId, b.benefit_no AS benefitNo, a.member_id AS memberId, u.nickname AS memberName, u.phone AS memberMobile, a.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, a.coach_id AS coachId, c.coach_name AS coachName, a.store_id AS storeId, s.storeName AS storeName, DATE_FORMAT(a.appointment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS appointmentDate, DATE_FORMAT(a.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, a.lesson_count AS lessonCount, a.appointment_status AS appointmentStatus, a.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, a.created_by AS createdBy, (CASE WHEN a.created_by = a.member_id THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS proxyBook, DATE_FORMAT(a.cancel_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS cancelAt, DATE_FORMAT(a.finish_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS finishAt, DATE_FORMAT(a.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN a.appointment_status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS bookedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.appointment_status = 3 THEN 1 END) AS finishedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.appointment_status = 2 THEN 1 END) AS cancelledCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.appointment_status = 4 THEN 1 END) AS noShowCount
a.deleted = 0

SELECT
WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0
AND a.store_id IN (${storeIds})
LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_private_appointment a WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0
AND a.store_id IN (${storeIds})

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_coach c WHERE c.id = #{coachId} AND c.deleted = 0
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pt_coach_store_rel r WHERE r.coach_id = c.id AND r.store_id IN (${storeIds}))
